data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time status updates, specifically the message 'Claimed by someone else'. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or functioning as expected. The linked use case describes the scenario where users receive this message, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system correctly handles and communicates this status to users, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time status updates being communicated to users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the real-time status update functionality.
